key.query: Wild Turkey Rare Breed Rye barrel proof official

emittedEvidence.query: Wild Turkey Rare Breed Rye barrel proof official
emittedEvidence.summary:
Yes — **Wild Turkey Rare Breed Rye** is presented by the producer as **barrel proof**. The strongest official confirmation is Wild Turkey’s product page, which says it is an **“uncut and non-chill filtered”** rye and **“bottled directly from the barrels at the 112.2 proof it reaches in those barrels.”** That same page also confirms it is a **blend of 4-, 6-, and 8-year-old Kentucky Straight Rye** whiskey. ([wildturkeybourbon.com](https://www.wildturkeybourbon.com/products/rare-breed-rye/?utm_source=openai))

Wild Turkey’s rye explainer separately reinforces that **Rare Breed Rye is bottled at

The strongest official confirmation is Wild Turkey’s product page, which says it is an **“uncut and non-chill filtered”** rye and **“bottled directly from the barrels at the 112.2 proof it reaches in those barrels.”** That same page also confirms it is a **blend of 4-, 6-, and 8-year-old Kentucky Straight Rye** whiskey. ([wildturkeybourbon.com](https://www.wildturkeybourbon.com/products/rare-breed-rye/?utm_source=openai))
